title: prime-seq 2
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"f6rjd","text":"This is the optimized version of the prime-seq protocol. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":37,"length":18}],"data":{}},{"key":"1pafn","text":"We systematically optimized the powerful and cost-efficient bulk RNA-seq protocol prime-seq. Notable efficiency enhancements were achieved by addressing DNase digestion, reverse transcription, adapter ligation, and amplification.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6su08","text":"The optimized protocol increased final unique molecular identifiers (UMIs) by 60 % at equal sequencing costs or, conversely, reduced sequencing costs by 38 % at equal counts. This further improves one of the most cost-efficient bulk RNA-seq protocols available, making it currently one of the best bulk RNA-seq options.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"26CD90AEC5444112AB89F682744BB941","url":"http://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.81wgb1pw3vpk/v2"}}}}
